mandate: Build partner dashboard UI at /partner with role-based views for officiant, church, counsellor, vendor
keyFindings: Church is the only partner type with meaningfully different UI (multi-officiant view). Officiant, counsellor, and vendor share the same layout.
Client-side navigation within the dashboard (Overview/Couples/Referral/Settings tabs) avoids full page reloads and matches the couple dashboard pattern
Added getChildPartners() server action with ChildPartnerWithStats type for the church hierarchy view
whatWorked: Matching the existing dashboard design language exactly (CSS variables, wf-serif/wf-sans classes, StatTile pattern). Server components for data fetching, client components only for interactivity.
recommendationsForNextAgent: The partner-analytics agent should pass metrics as props through the existing server component data flow in page.tsx, not create new data fetching paths.
spiritContribution: Made the B2B2C channel visible and manageable for partners. The dashboard is the surface that turns a relationship into a scalable channel.
